roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
FELONY PLEA (STATE PRISON INDICATED) TX FILED

/TN ROMAN DEAN JARVIS/MTR-DA/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVK/AJW/CH1 SP 6 Y U/CCC:COURT NUMBERS 13016265 & 16008729/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 433 DAYS COUNTY JAIL, 432 DAYS  SAGEFOR A TOTAL OF 865 DAYS,/DNACOMP/VF5:300/PROBREVFN1:300/PAR/CDC/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANTTO PC 1170(H)/CCC: THIS CASE AND #16008729/
